Interface IRasterWorkspace

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster workspace.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("AAE25031-35FB-11D2-B1F2-00C04F8EDEFF")]
public interface IRasterWorkspace

Methods

CanCopy()

Indicates if this dataset can be copied.

bool CanCopy()

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

Copy(string, IWorkspace) 

IDataset Copy(string copyName, IWorkspace copyWorkspace)

Parameters

copyName string
copyWorkspace IWorkspace

Returns

IDataset

CreateRasterBand(string)

Creates a RasterBand in the workspace given its name.

IRasterBand CreateRasterBand(string Name)

Parameters

Name string

Returns

IRasterBand

Examples

Sample Snippet

CreateRasterDataset(string)

Creates a RasterDataset in the workspace given its name.

IRasterDataset CreateRasterDataset(string Name)

Parameters

Name string

Returns

IRasterDataset

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsWorkspace(string)

Indicates if the file path specified is a raster workspace.

bool IsWorkspace(string Name)

Parameters

Name string

Returns

bool

Sample Snippet

OpenRasterBand(string)

Opens a RasterBand in the workspace given its name.
